name: artifact-workspace
title: Artifact Workspace
description: A compact, accessible surface for durable outputs outside chat text.

notes: Validate untrusted artifact payloads before rendering and enforce host permissions before loading versions.
Tabs expose tab and selected semantics and the host must preserve heading structure in children.

documentation.whenToUse: Use when generated outputs need a lifecycle distinct from conversation history.
documentation.whenNotToUse: Do not use it as a persistence layer, artifact validator, or binary sandbox.
tradeoffs: Persistence, versioning, editing, and typed renderers remain application-owned.
